top_stories.title: Baidu Releases Unlimited OCR, a 3B Model That Keeps the KV Cache Flat for Long-Document Parsing
top_stories.description: Baidu open-sourced Unlimited OCR, a 3B-parameter MoE model that parses dozens of document pages in a single forward pass. Its Reference Sliding Window Attention (R-SWA) holds the KV cache constant, so memory and latency stay flat as output grows. It scores 93.23 on OmniDocBench v1.5, beating the DeepSeek OCR baseline by 6.22 points, under an MIT license. The post Baidu Releases Unlimited OCR, a 3B Model That Keeps the KV Cache Flat for Long-Document Parsing appeared first on MarkTechPost.
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq
top_stories.content: Baidu open-sourced Unlimited OCR, a 3B-parameter MoE model that parses dozens of document pages in a single forward pass. Its Reference Sliding Window Attention (R-SWA) holds the KV cache constant, so memory and latency stay flat as output grows. It scores 93.23 on OmniDocBench v1.5, beating the DeepSeek OCR baseline by 6.22 points, under an MIT license. The post Baidu Releases Unlimited OCR, a 3B Model That Keeps the KV Cache Flat for Long-Document Parsing appeared first on MarkTechPost.

top_stories.title: Running ComfyUI workflows on Amazon SageMaker AI processing jobs
top_stories.description: In this post, we walk you through how to deploy ComfyUI workflows on Amazon SageMaker AI processing jobs to generate hundreds of high-quality images in a single batch. You learn how to set up the infrastructure using AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK), configure GPU-accelerated processing, and automate image generation at scale. You can then adapt this solution to your ComfyUI workflows specific to your needs. We will guide you through a practical, step-by-step process to automate ComfyUI...
top_stories.author: Nick Biso
top_stories.content: In this post, we walk you through how to deploy ComfyUI workflows on Amazon SageMaker AI processing jobs to generate hundreds of high-quality images in a single batch. You can then adapt this solution to your ComfyUI workflows specific to your needs. We will guide you through a practical, step-by-step process to automate ComfyUI...

top_stories.title: NVIDIA Powers Over 400 of the World’s 500 Fastest Supercomputers
top_stories.description: NVIDIA technologies power more than 400 of the world’s 500 fastest supercomputers — 81% of the TOP500 — according to the latest rankings released this week at the ISC High Performance conference in Hamburg, Germany.
top_stories.author: Chris Porter
top_stories.content: NVIDIA technologies power more than 400 of the world’s 500 fastest supercomputers — 81% of the TOP500 — according to the latest rankings released this week at the ISC High Performance conference in Hamburg, Germany.

top_stories.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
top_stories.description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
top_stories.content: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
